description_long: This is a small fairy doll standing upright on a round, dark pedestal base. The doll features delicate, translucent green wings with vein-like patterns extending from its back, and wears a light green, leaf-textured dress with jagged edges. Its arms are bent with hands resting on its hips, and its legs are crossed at the ankles, giving a confident, playful stance. The doll has pale skin, a blonde bun hairstyle, and dainty green shoes. The facial features are softly modeled, with a gentle smile and subtle blush on the cheeks. The overall appearance is whimsical and reminiscent of classic fairy tale characters.
description: A whimsical fairy doll with green wings, a leaf-patterned dress, and a blonde bun, standing on a round pedestal base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face, crossed legs, green dress, and both wings fully visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm bent at the hip, and the layered structure of the wings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the full expanse of the wings, and the back of the dress.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, arm position, and the three-dimensional shape of the wings and dress.
attribute_clothing_style: A sleeveless, jagged-edge, leaf-patterned green dress reminiscent of classic fairy tale fairies, paired with matching green shoes.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with legs crossed at the ankles, arms bent and hands resting on hips, head facing forward, and torso upright.
attribute_facial_expression: Smiling with relaxed eyes and slightly raised eyebrows, conveying a friendly and playful demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Short blonde hair styled in a neat bun at the top of the head.
